Singular: Generator Plural: Generatoren (currently used in-game)

trans-unit.note: ID and character are not the same, this may be a mistake?
@myh25224 it is correct. silo is generic term for trailer body type, that is also used as transaltion key. "dry bulk" is american term used for it.

@Max007 My mistake was that I didn't notice the context of the word, and there was also a problem with the whole Chinese simplified translation (I didn't notice whether this problem also exists in the Chinese traditional ). The Chinese period is not displayed in the game, it is directly skipped, and it is very difficult to read in the context of large blocks of text. "。"

trans-unit.note: The exact term for a dolly in french is "Diabolo", as shown on this website : https://max-atlas.com/fr/cat-trailer/diabolos/
@rookie_one This is for Québec. There are some differences between fr_fr and fr_ca. In fr_fr, both are used.

@Mel85 For ATS, I would favorise fr_CA, at least until we get a separate fr_CA translation in-game.
It would get a more "local" feel for ATS, and one that is more relevant to ATS IMO

@rookie_one You're right, as, for translations where there isn't real translation in fr_fr, I tend to search how it is in fr_ca.
Let's do it for specific ATS terms.

trans-unit.note: It's in the "names of cities" category, but there are no cities or towns on Cote Blanche island, only some mines. Should we translate it as "island", i.e. distinct from a "city", or keep it as close to what would be a city name as possible?
Ok, looks like it's a ferry destination. I think then it can count as an island, not a city.
